tagline: The Zoho Books connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Zoho Books connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector ingests accounting data such as invoices, bills, contacts, and bank transactions from Zoho Books into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The Zoho Books connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector ingests accounting data such as invoices, bills, contacts, and bank transactions from Zoho Books into Databricks.
key_takeaway: The Zoho Books connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
